data.title: Buy Rating on MapLight: Differentiated CNS Pipeline and Undervalued Schizophrenia Opportunity with Upside in Alzheimer’s and Neuropsychiatric Indications
data.description:
MapLight Therapeutics, Inc. (MPLT) has received a new Buy rating, initiated by TD Cowen analyst, Joseph Thome.

Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Joseph Thome has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors tied to MapLight’s differentiated CNS pipeline and valuation. He highlights lead candidate ML-007C-MA, a next‑generation M1/M4 agonist in Phase II, which is designed to match or exceed Cobenfy’s efficacy in schizophrenia while reducing gastrointestinal and peripheral cholinergic side effects and simplifying dosing, potentially improving adherence and real‑world outcomes.

He further notes that his KOL checks suggest substantial room to enhance the current muscarinic standard of care, supporting his modeled peak U.S. sales of $1.3B and an NPV of $35 per share for schizophrenia alone, making the current share price look too low on that indication by itself. In addition, he sees meaningful optionality from expansion into Alzheimer’s psychosis and other neuropsychiatric disorders such as agitation in Alzheimer’s disease, autism spectrum disorder, and bipolar disorder, markets that currently lack robust treatments and therefore provide upside not fully reflected in his base‑case assumptions.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk
